title: GravePlugin
description: Never lose your items on death again! Your items are safe in a grave.
body: This plugin adds a gravestone feature to your server. When a player dies, a grave is created at their death location, storing their items safely. Players can then return to their grave to retrieve their belongings. This plugin helps prevent players from losing their inventory upon death, especially in dangerous environments. The plugin is configurable to suit your server's needs.
